name: Vue 3 + Nuxt
systemContext: Vue 3 project using Composition API and <script setup> syntax. Nuxt 3 for SSR/SSG if applicable. Pinia for state management. TypeScript required. Styling with Tailwind CSS or UnoCSS.

rules: Always use <script setup lang='ts'> — never Options API
Props use defineProps with TypeScript generics, not runtime validators
Emits use defineEmits with TypeScript signature
Use storeToRefs() to destructure reactive store properties
Never mutate state outside of store actions
Server data: use useFetch() or useAsyncData() in Nuxt
All composables must return typed objects

forbiddenZones.reason: Environment files must never be modified by agents
